column1: # name: Unique sample name. Only use alphanumeric characters and '_'. [Value Type: String]
# reads: File path to fastq file containing reads. Either as absolute path or relative to this file. [Value Type: Path]
# condition: Condition name of the sequencing run. May contain [A-Z, a-z, 0-9, _;!@^(),.[]-, Whitespace]. [Value Type: String]
